room.caption: [G1-1] You shouldn't be surprised, we have to start here.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(7)
if global.gameProgress=140 global.gameProgress=150 else if global.gameProgress>=170 instance_create(5136,240,oMarioQBlock)
if global.hasAbilToken[0]=1 and global.gameProgress<=500 global.hasAbilToken[0]=2
backFollowFore=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollowFore.type=2; backFollowFore.backSet=backMarioA backFollowFore.xMoveScale=0.6; backFollowFore.yMoveScale=1; backFollowFore.depth=1499999
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh2MainA) sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh2SideA)
if global.gameProgress>=160 { var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(101) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0) }
musicUnload(0)

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=false exitType=2 newMapX=96 newMapY=48 toRoom=rMario1_2 if global.gameProgress<=16 {instance_destroy()}
stringToShow="You can save your progress from the pause menu. Open with [P]." signSize=1
bShowArrow=false exitType=2 newMapX=80 newMapY=144 toRoom=rMario1_1Secret y+=24
